title: origanum × dumanii
intro: Origanum × dumanii, also known as Duman's marjoram, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, resulting from the cross between Origanum majorana and Origanum heracleoticum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Origanum × dumanii include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as tea, added to food, or used in essential oil form to harness its medicinal properties.
